claims.summary: Persistent latest telemetry across reconnects can look stable after hearing has gone stale.
claims.disposition: verify stale-hearing and ghost-stability classifications remain explicit

claims.summary: Backoff and packet timing should be correlated without treating timing as felt causation.
claims.disposition: verify connection trace and heartbeat-delta evidence with noncausal language

claims.summary: The subscriber could move to an actor or lock-free snapshot path.
claims.disposition: retain as an operator-gated telemetry-intake change pending measured wait or hold interference
